allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "---"; Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" repo view Ouss77/koora-mobile --json name,url,defaultBranchRef 2>&1)
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" label list --repo Ouss77/koora-mobile 2>&1)
